message:
feat(command,runtime,server): implement CLIENT UNBLOCK with blocked-client tracking and fix LATENCY subcommands

Add full CLIENT UNBLOCK support: the runtime tracks blocked client IDs
and queues pending unblock requests, while the server event loop drains
and applies them (timeout/nil or UNBLOCKED error). Includes dedup logic
so the same client is not unblocked twice.

Harden LATENCY command: add DOCTOR subcommand, enforce correct arity for
LATEST/HISTORY/GRAPH/DOCTOR, fix RESET to return integer 0 instead of
OK, and return a proper error string for GRAPH when no samples exist.

Trim whitespace in parse_i64_arg and parse_f64_arg for more lenient
number parsing. Replace fallible try_into with copy_from_slice in
hll_hash for robustness. Extract server --help text into a testable
function and add --bind flag documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
